Question: What is the kinetic energy of an electron if its speed is 0.992 c ?
Answer: Substitute the data into the given equation: $$p = \gamma m u = \frac{m u}{\sqrt{1 - \frac{u^{2}}{c^{2}}}} = \frac{( 9.11 \times 10^{-31} \text{kg} ) ( 0.985 ) ( 3.00 \times 10^{8} \text{m/s} )}{\sqrt{1 - \frac{( 0.985 c )^{2}}{c^{2}}}} = 1.56 \times 10^{-21} \text{kg-m/s.}$$
